name: Dwight, Diane
evidence: M. Diane Dwight is a State Bar of Texas attorney (retired, solo firm) listed at 6409 Soter Pkwy, Austin, TX 78735 -- zip matches the donor record exactly.

name: Hayes, Emmitt
resolved_employer: LTBL (Let There Be Light) Consultants, founder/CEO; retired 2014 as Director, Probation Services Division, Travis County Juvenile Probation Dept.
evidence: Emmitt W. Hayes Jr. of Austin retired in 2014 as Director of the Probation Services Division at the Travis County Probation Dept and now runs LTBL Consultants (workforce development / juvenile-justice training); Travis County Commissioners Court appointed him a trustee of Austin Travis County Integral Care. Gave to Travis County commissioner Jeff Travillion, consistent with his county career.

affiliations.org: Austin Travis County Integral Care (Board of Trustees)

name: Lloyd Doggett for Congress
resolved_employer: Federal campaign committee of U.S. Rep. Lloyd Doggett (D-TX)
evidence: This is not an individual but the principal campaign committee of longtime U.S. Congressman Lloyd Doggett (D-Austin); the record self-identifies occupation 'Congressman', employer 'U.S. Congress', Austin 78702. A candidate committee making a transfer to a local Democratic candidate (George Morales).
